Title: Successful Login
Preconditions: User has a valid username and password.
Test Steps:
1. User enters the username and password in the login form.
2. User clicks on the login button.
3. Main interface sends a request to the Authentication service with the provided credentials.
4. Authentication service verifies the credentials and returns a token.
5. Main interface receives the token and proceeds.
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully and the main interface displays the "done" message.

Title: Invalid Credentials
Preconditions: User enters invalid username or password.
Test Steps:
1. User enters the invalid username and password in the login form.
2. User clicks on the login button.
3. Main interface sends a request to the Authentication service with the provided credentials.
4. Authentication service returns an error indicating invalid credentials.
5. Main interface displays an error message.
Expected Result: User is not logged in and an error message is displayed.

Title: Empty Credentials
Preconditions: User leaves the username and password fields empty.
Test Steps:
1. User leaves the username and password fields empty.
2. User clicks on the login button.
3. Main interface sends a request to the Authentication service with empty credentials.
4. Authentication service returns an error indicating empty credentials.
5. Main interface displays an error message.
Expected Result: User is not logged in and an error message is displayed.

Title: Successful Plant Data Insertion
Test Data: Plant name: Rose, Description: A beautiful red rose.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the plant insertion page.
2. User enters the plant name and description.
3. User clicks on the save button.
4. DataManager processes the insertion request.
5. DataManager stores the plant data.
Expected Result: Plant data is successfully inserted into the system.

Title: Empty Plant Name
Test Data: Plant name: , Description: A beautiful red rose.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the plant insertion page.
2. User enters an empty plant name and a valid description.
3. User clicks on the save button.
4. DataManager processes the insertion request.
5. DataManager returns an error indicating an empty plant name.
Expected Result: Plant data insertion fails and an error message is displayed.

Title: Duplicate Plant Name
Test Data: Plant name: Rose, Description: A beautiful red rose.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the plant insertion page.
2. User enters the same plant name and a different description.
3. User clicks on the save button.
4. DataManager processes the insertion request.
5. DataManager returns an error indicating duplicate plant name.
Expected Result: Plant data insertion fails and an error message is displayed.

Title: Successful Diary Data Insertion
Test Data: Diary entry: Today I watered the plants.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the diary insertion page.
2. User enters the diary entry.
3. User clicks on the save button.
4. DataManager processes the insertion request.
5. DataManager stores the diary data.
Expected Result: Diary data is successfully inserted into the system.

Title: Empty Diary Entry
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the diary insertion page.
2. User enters an empty diary entry.
3. User clicks on the save button.
4. DataManager processes the insertion request.
5. DataManager returns an error indicating an empty diary entry.
Expected Result: Diary data insertion fails and an error message is displayed.

Title: Successful Plant Photo Upload
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a valid plant photo.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the plant photo upload page.
2. User selects the plant photo.
3. User clicks on the upload button.
4. Gemini AI API identifies the plant species.
5. Firebase Storage stores the identified species.
6. Firebase Storage returns the download URL of the uploaded photo.
7. Main interface displays the photo with the identified species.
Expected Result: Plant photo is successfully uploaded and the species is correctly identified.

Title: Invalid Plant Photo
Preconditions: User is logged in and has an invalid plant photo (e.g., no plant visible).
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the plant photo upload page.
2. User selects the invalid plant photo.
3. User clicks on the upload button.
4. Gemini AI API returns an error indicating no plant visible.
5. Main interface displays an error message.
Expected Result: Plant photo upload fails and an error message is displayed.

Title: Empty Plant Photo
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the plant photo upload page.
2. User selects an empty photo.
3. User clicks on the upload button.
4. Gemini AI API returns an error indicating no photo selected.
5. Main interface displays an error message.
Expected Result: Plant photo upload fails and an error message is displayed.
